pillars.title: Sweat the Small Stuff
pillars.description: Meticulous attention to every detail, from social media captions to data entries, ensuring zero errors and consistent quality.

pillars.title: Create Urgency
pillars.description: Proactive and momentum-driven, keeping projects moving and delivering ahead of deadlines whenever possible.

pillars.title: Define Consequences & Deadlines
pillars.description: Clear timelines, structured workflows, and accountability ensure every project lands on time and on target.

pillars.title: Use Rational Facts
pillars.description: All recommendations and strategies are grounded in data, analytics, and research — never assumptions.

aboutText:
I'm Charles — a versatile Virtual Assistant and Social Media Manager based in Odiongan, Romblon, Philippines. For over 8 years I've helped businesses grow their online presence through organized, precise, and deadline-driven work.

My approach is guided by four core work pillars that ensure every task is completed with accuracy, urgency, and data-backed decisions. Trained by DICT in Social Media Management and Marketing, with additional certifications in cybersecurity and AI, I offer clients a uniquely well-rounded remote professional.

Beyond traditional VA work, I specialize in OSINT research, blockchain & Web3 analysis, and AI-powered automation — bringing technical depth to every project.
